evals.prompt:
Given the following TFVC changesets (plain text) and using Azure DevOps organization https://dev.azure.com/mycompany with $DEVOPS_PAT available in PowerShell, generate cards.md and changelog.md as specified in the skill. Changesets:

4575 Developer Name 11490 - Description of changes

Produce cards.md with an entry for work item 11490 including a one-sentence summary and changelog.md under ProjectName -> Bug Fixes with the changelog item formatted as specified.
evals.expected_output: cards.md containing ## 11490 – {Title} ({Work Item Type}) with State, Assigned to, Link, and short summary; changelog.md with ProjectName -> Bug Fixes listing - **11490** – {Title} and one-sentence summary.
expectations: cards.md is created in the output directory
changelog.md contains 'ProjectName' section and a line '- **11490**' under it

evals.prompt:
Given these TFVC changesets referencing multiple IDs, generate cards.md and changelog.md grouped by project.

4565 Developer Name BUGS 9761, 11118, 11149
4567 Developer Name User Story 9975: Feature description

Use the DevOps API to enrich work item details. Expect cards.md entries for 9761, 11118, 11149, 9975 and changelog.md split by project with appropriate sections (Bug Fixes / New Features).
evals.expected_output: cards.md with four entries enriched from DevOps API; changelog.md grouping by project showing bug fixes for 9761, 11118, 11149 and New Features for 9975, each with one-sentence impact statements.
expectations: changelog.md groups items by project name
Each listed work item appears once in cards.md and once in changelog.md

evals.prompt:
Edge cases: deduplication and odd ID formats.

10086: Developer Name 10086: Description
4578 Developer Name 10086

Only include each work item once. Generate cards.md and changelog.md; ensure duplicates are deduplicated and summaries derive from discussion/history when titles are ambiguous.
evals.expected_output: cards.md contains a single entry for 10086 with deduplicated metadata and a concise summary; changelog.md lists 10086 once in the appropriate project/category.
expectations: No duplicate card entries are present for ID 10086
